title: mace nerf
description:
an very simple/bad mace nerf.
mace now has an 60 second cooldown, and can only be enchanted with mending and unbreaking.
body:
a mod i made for the server i play on, i might port.
this mod simply makes maces have an 60 second cooldown, and removes all enchants except unbreaking and mending.

there may be some issues, and i dont recomend using it.
